name: voice-replies-sticky-global
description: When the user asks to receive replies as voice notes, the global router interceptor sets a sticky metadata.voiceReplies flag and acks (the ack itself goes out as a voice note). The preference persists across turns and every subsequent plain-text reply is sent as audio — not just in salesBot. TTS + audio send are mocked.

turns.user: can you reply to me in voice notes from now on instead of typing?
